в—Џ Send response to leader and save output (shell)
  в”‚ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--messaging-bus
  в”‚
  в”‚ # Send response to leader
  в”‚ npx storyboard terminal send agent-yvgtb1 "Here are my 4 content strategy
  в”‚ recommendations for design system documentation: (1) Layer docs by audience вЂ” вЂ¦
  в”” 17 lines...

в—Џ Signal done (shell)
  в”‚ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--messaging-bus
  в”‚ npx storyboard agent signal --status done --message "Published 4 content strategy
  в”‚ recommendations as markdown widget and sent summary to leader"
  в”” 2 lines...

в—Џ Done. I've:

   1. Created a markdown widget (markdown-2cdgn3) connected to my terminal with 4
  recommendations:
   - Layer docs by audience вЂ” quick-starts, API ref, decision records
   - Embed docs where work happens вЂ” IDE types, living examples, linter rules
   - Publish a changelog cadence вЂ” release notes, deprecation timelines, digests
   - Create a contribution playbook вЂ” contribution guide, RFC template, office hours
   2. Sent summary back to gold-egret via messaging
   3. Signaled done
